queries.text:
orders
| where event_time >= now() - 1h
| summarize Revenue = sum(total_price)

let startTime = now() - 60m;
orders
| where event_time between (startTime .. now())
| summarize Orders = count() by bin(event_time, 1m)
| order by event_time asc

let startTime = now() - 60m;
orders
| where event_time between (startTime .. now())
| summarize rev = sum(total_price), cnt = count() by bin(event_time, 1m)
| extend AOV = iff(cnt == 0, real(0), rev / cnt)
| project event_time, AOV
| order by event_time asc

let startTime = now() - 60m;
orders
| where event_time between (startTime .. now())
| summarize total = count(), with_promo = countif(isnotempty(promo_code)) by bin(event_time, 1m)
| extend Promo_Usage_Pct = iff(total == 0, real(0), 100.0 * with_promo / total)
| project event_time, Promo_Usage_Pct
| order by event_time asc

let startTime = now() - 60m;
orders
| where event_time between (startTime .. now())
| summarize total_orders = count(),
            combo_orders = countif(isnotempty(combination_id))
          by t = bin(event_time, 1m)
| extend Conversion_Pct = iif(total_orders == 0, real(0), 100.0 * todouble(combo_orders) / todouble(total_orders))
| project event_time = t, total_orders, combo_orders, Conversion_Pct
| order by event_time asc
